candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over subtotal duplicates.
Total revenue line matches top-line and mirrors Revenue values; useful as fallback if label changes across years.
Revenue component, but not full top-line because rental/service revenue is reported separately.
Revenue component, but not the full top-line.

variables.notes: Use reported consolidated revenue line as priority, with Total Revenue as fallback for possible label changes. Do not sum components.

candidates.why: Best match for direct operating/cost-of-sales type expense on the income statement.
Inventory adjustment can sometimes be part of COGS, but here it is blank and not sufficient alone.
Balancing row, not an economic line item.
Balance sheet inventory asset, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct operating cost line from the income statement.

candidates.why: Core overhead/personnel cost component above operating profit.
Broad overhead bucket, but a subtotal because more granular components exist below it.
Selling/marketing overhead component above operating profit.
Residual operating overhead component above operating profit.
SG&A component in name, but likely already included within Employee benefit expenses in recent years.

candidates.row_label: Other Wages, Salaries and Employee benefits ex
candidates.why: Subcomponent of Employee benefit expenses rather than a separate bucket across all years.
Label fits SG&A concept but appears unpopulated and less clearly used than Marketing Expenses.

candidates.row_label: Costs related to strategic and organisational development
candidates.why: Appears restructuring/strategic, likely non-recurring rather than core SG&A.

variables.notes: R:c. No explicit SG&A total row exists. Chose recurring overhead components and preferred components over subtotal 'Other Operating Expenses'. Excluded restructuring/non-recurring items and excluded stock-based compensation to avoid double counting because it appears embedded in Employee benefit expenses.

candidates.row_label: Costs related to strategic and organisational development
candidates.why: Not a dedicated research/development expense; more consistent with strategic/restructuring costs.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line identified.

candidates.why: Granular recurring interest expense component.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Granular recurring borrowing interest expense component.
Small recurring finance-cost bucket; included only as granular component, not with total financial expenses.
Broad total includes FX and other finance items; less preferred than granular recurring components.
Supplemental duplicate of lease interest with opposite sign presentation; avoid duplicating main line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost rows and excluded FX differences and broad totals to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line; excludes non-controlling interests and satisfies BE + MIB construction.
Equity subcomponent only, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution line, not balance sheet equity.
Balancing row, not an equity measure.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity line so MIB can be added separately without double counting.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet NCI/minority interest line with reported value.
Also matches concept, but appears unpopulated in preview compared with lowercase variant.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet minority interest line; pairs cleanly with parent-only BE.
